We are the Department of Advertising.

We are adHAS.

We bring new talents to the advertising world.

We produce great Account Executives, strategists, and creative minds...

We excel in both traditional and new media advertising...

We win awards.

We train advertisers who think fast and differently,

know crisis management, generate solutions, and make us proud with their achievements.
